title: chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. maekawanum
intro: Chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. maekawanum, also known as Japanese chrysanthemum, is a plant species native to East Asia, specifically in Japan, and is a subspecies of the Chrysanthemum arcticum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. maekawanum include its ability to alleviate fever, improve respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and boost the immune system.
